auth.tagline: Build your empire · Forge alliances · Conquer the world
auth.registerSuccess: Nation deployed. Check your email to verify, then login.
auth.errPassLen: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errBanned: Your nation has been suspended. Contact admin.

nation.errNameShort: Nation name must be at least 2 characters.
nation.errNameTaken: That nation name is already taken this round. Try another.
nation.stillActive: Your commander account ({{username}}) is still active. Rise again — found a new nation in Round {{round}}.

dashboard.title: Command Center
dashboard.noActivity: No recent activity. Attack your first nation!

military.title: Military
military.draftCost: $10/soldier · High draft rate lowers security index
military.draftAtCap: ⚠️ At soldier capacity: {{soldiers}} / {{max}} (increase draft % or grow population)

economy.title: Economy
economy.facilityDesc_farm: Basic income source. Cheap to build, low returns.
economy.facilityDesc_oil_rig: Extracts oil. High income, vulnerable to blockades.
economy.facilityDesc_power_plant: Generates power. High income for its cost.
economy.facilityDesc_port: Trade hub. Very high income per hour.
economy.facilityDesc_bank: Financial institution. High income per hour.
economy.facilityDesc_mine: Extracts raw materials. Steady income per hour.
economy.facilityDesc_solar: Renewable energy. Good income with low upkeep.
economy.facilityDesc_tech_lab: Research facility. High income per hour.
economy.facilityDesc_airport: Air transport hub. Highest income for its cost.
economy.facilityDesc_market: Underground trade. Highest build cost, lower returns.

attacks.title: Attack Center
attacks.errEnterMissiles: Enter how many missiles to launch.
attacks.blockadeWarning: ⚓ YOUR PORTS ARE BLOCKADED — Oil rig and port income is 0. Use "Break Blockade" to restore trade.
attacks.activeBlockadeMsg: ⚓ ACTIVE BLOCKADE — You are currently blockading a nation. Their trade income is 0.
attacks.debuffAirSup: Enemy has air superiority over you
attacks.errNoMissiles: Enter how many missiles to launch.
attacks.errNoDestroyers: You need Destroyers for this mission.
attacks.errRequiresTanksArtillery: Industrial Occupation requires Tanks AND Artillery.
attacks.errBlockadeActive: You already have an active blockade on this nation.
attacks.errNotBlockaded: You are not currently under a blockade.
attacks.errNeedBombersDestroyers: Need Bombers or Destroyers to break a blockade.
attacks.descMissileStrike: Destroy enemy oil rigs, factories and power plants. Each missile that gets through eliminates one facility.
attacks.descSead: Target enemy SAM Batteries. Success disables their air defenses for 15 minutes.
attacks.descDemoralization: Strike civilian infrastructure. Drops enemy security and halts population growth + 5% income penalty for 24h.
attacks.descAirSuperiority: Destroy the enemy air force. Victory grants a 1-hour window where your bombers operate freely.
attacks.descAirClash: Fight for control of the skies in a direct clash between opposing fighter squadrons.
attacks.descFactoryBombing: Bomb enemy factories to cripple production and weaken their industrial output.
attacks.descCarpetBombing: Devastate enemy ground forces. WARNING: Enemy SAMs shred bombers — use SEAD first.
attacks.descTankHunter: Surgical strikes on enemy tanks. Extremely effective without enemy air cover.
attacks.descTankHunt: Hunt enemy armor with repeated strike runs. Most effective when enemy air cover is weak.
attacks.descBlitzRaid: Storm the enemy treasury. APCs boost success rate significantly.
attacks.descCommandoRaid: Insert commandos behind enemy lines to strike quickly and escape before a full response.
attacks.descMineClearing: Use artillery to clear fortified ground and open a safer path for future assaults.
attacks.descAttrition: Long-range bombardment of enemy APCs and Tanks. Very low risk — the safe grind.
attacks.descIndustrialOccupation: Full assault to seize an enemy oil rig. Your security drops due to occupation strain.
attacks.descTotalInvasion: Commit your full army to a decisive assault with massive rewards and equally massive risk.
attacks.descNavalRaid: Launch a naval strike against enemy coastal forces using destroyers and submarines.
attacks.descNavalBlockade: Blockade enemy ports. As long as blockade holds, all enemy oil rig and port income drops to 0.
attacks.descSubmarineHunt: Hunt and sink enemy submarines. Only destroyers can effectively eliminate subs.
attacks.descBreakBlockade: Break an active blockade on YOUR nation. Only available when you are currently blockaded.
attacks.descScorchedEarth: Unleash overwhelming destruction with missiles and bombers to leave enemy infrastructure in ruins.
attacks.costHeavyBomberLosses: Heavy bomber losses if SAMs active
attacks.costRiskTankApcLosses: Risk of tank and APC losses
attacks.noEnemySubs: Enemy has no submarines to hunt.
attacks.descFullAssault: Total war — commit all ground units (tanks, APCs, artillery, helicopters + soldiers). On success: destroy enemy units, seize land AND a facility. High losses on both sides.
attacks.costFullAssault: Heavy losses across all ground units
attacks.errRequiresGroundUnits: You need at least one ground unit (tanks, APCs, artillery, or helicopters).

alliances.title: Alliances
alliances.descPlaceholder: What does your alliance stand for?
alliances.openLabel: Open to all (anyone can join without invite)
alliances.beFirst: Be the first to found one!
alliances.leaveConfirm: Leave {{name}}? You will lose all alliance benefits.
alliances.disbandConfirm: Disband {{name}}? This will remove all members and cannot be undone.
alliances.errNameLength: Alliance name must be at least 3 characters.
alliances.inviteNoneFound: No nation found with that name.

intelligence.title: Intelligence
intelligence.spyDesc: Infiltrate enemy nations, gather reports, sabotage facilities and steal money.
intelligence.satDesc: Aerial reconnaissance — scan enemy land, troop movements and facility counts.
intelligence.counterDesc: Reduces enemy spy mission success. Each level adds -12% to enemy spy chance.
intelligence.antiSatDesc: Reduces enemy satellite success and has a chance to shoot down enemy satellites.
intelligence.techDesc: Boosts ALL mission success rates by +5% per level.
intelligence.unlimitedCapNote: Unlimited — cap price kicks in at level {{level}}.
intelligence.operationsSub: Select a target nation and launch a mission
intelligence.descReconMilitary: Reveal exact unit counts — tanks, jets, missiles and more.
intelligence.descReconIndustrial: Reveal enemy factories, buildings and available land.
intelligence.descReconTech: Reveal upgrade levels of all enemy unit types.
intelligence.descTechSting: Sabotage enemy servers. Degrades a random unit tech by 1 level. Costs 20 turns.
intelligence.descIndustrialSabotage: Trigger chaos — gas explosions, grid shutdowns. Drops enemy security 15–20 pts.
intelligence.descTrojanHorse: Infect ABM/AA systems. Disables 20–40% of missile defense for 30 min.
intelligence.descUnitSabotage: Destroy jets and helicopters on the ground. Silent — no alert to enemy.
intelligence.descCounterIntel: Deploy a smokescreen. Enemy recon sees inflated/false data for 12 hours.
intelligence.resultSmokescreenWarning: ⚠️ Data may be spoofed — enemy smokescreen active
intelligence.smokescreenDesc: Enemy recon will receive false data
intelligence.errNeedTarget: This mission requires a target nation.
intelligence.resultSecDrop: Enemy security index dropped by {{pts}} points
intelligence.resultSelfSecDrop: Your security dropped by {{pts}} points (international condemnation)
intelligence.sumReconMilitary: Military reconnaissance complete. Unit positions mapped.
intelligence.sumReconIndustrial: Industrial scan complete. Facility layout and land usage captured.
intelligence.sumReconTech: Tech scan complete. Enemy upgrade levels identified.
intelligence.sumJammed: Signal lost due to electronic jamming. Satellites blinded.
intelligence.sumSmokescreen: Smokescreen deployed. Enemy recon will receive false data for 12 hours.
intelligence.sumSmokecrash: System crash! Your real data is now more accessible to enemy recon for 6 hours.
intelligence.sumTechStingSuccess: Tech-Sting succeeded! Enemy unit tech degraded by 1 level.
intelligence.sumTechStingFail: Spies compromised. Defender is now on high alert for 24 hours.
intelligence.sumTechStingNoTarget: Tech-Sting succeeded but no upgradeable units found to degrade.
intelligence.sumSabotageSuccess: Industrial sabotage succeeded! Enemy security index dropped.
intelligence.sumSabotageFail: Spies captured and confessed! International condemnation — your security dropped.
intelligence.sumTrojanSuccess: Trojan Horse deployed! Enemy missile defense disabled.
intelligence.sumTrojanFail: Intrusion detected! Enemy ABM systems locked into Autonomous Mode.
intelligence.sumUnitSabotageSuccess: Unit sabotage successful. Jets and helicopters destroyed on the ground.
intelligence.sumUnitSabotageFail: Agents neutralized at enemy air base. Spies lost.
intelligence.sumBlockadeBroken: Blockade broken. Your trade routes are restored.

hof.title: 🏆 Hall of Fame
hof.subtitle: Legends of Nation Commander
hof.emptyDesc: Be the first to finish a round and claim your place in history.

profile.title: Commander Profile
profile.deleteWarning: Permanently delete your commander account. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteConfirmMsg: This will permanently remove your account and all associated data. Your nations, alliances, and history will be lost forever.

admin.configHelp: Changes take effect immediately. All values affect new game rounds.

login_logs.label: Login Logs
login_logs.subLabel: Every login attempt with IP and browser

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.subLabel: Edit unit, facility, and action costs

prompts.invalidTurns: Invalid amount. Enter a number between 0 and 200.
prompts.editMoney:
{{name}}'s nation "{{nation}}" current money: ${{money}}

Enter new amount:

sections.militaryEquipmentHelp: Cost to purchase, maintenance per 2h, attack power, defense power
sections.economyFacilitiesHelp: Build cost, income per hour, upkeep per hour, land required
sections.intelligenceCostsHelp: Levels 1 to cap-1 cost base times level. At cap level and above, the fixed cap price applies.

notifications.notif_warning_fiscal_msg: Your nation could not fully cover military maintenance. The unpaid bill of ${{shortfall}} has caused civil unrest. Security index dropped by {{sec}} point(s). Keep your treasury positive to avoid further penalties.
notifications.notif_danger_fiscal_msg: Your nation is in a severe fiscal crisis! The unpaid maintenance bill of ${{shortfall}} exceeds $50,000. Security dropped by {{sec}} point(s) and 10% of all military equipment was lost due to desertion and neglect. Immediately increase your income or reduce your military.
notifications.notif_danger_tech_sting_msg: Enemy spies sabotaged your {{unit}} tech! Level dropped from {{old}} to {{new}}. You must re-upgrade to restore capability.
notifications.notif_danger_sabotage_msg: Enemy agents caused chaos across your nation. Security index dropped by {{sec}} points.
notifications.notif_warning_unit_sabotage_msg: Enemy saboteurs were intercepted before they could damage your aircraft.
notifications.notif_info_alliance_invite_msg: You have been invited to join {{alliance}}. Visit the Alliances page to accept or decline.

battleReport.intelClassified: Intel classified — no reconnaissance data available.
battleReport.summaryConquestWin: Conquest succeeded. Your forces overwhelmed the enemy, capturing {{land}} land units. Enemy lost {{defLost}} soldiers. You lost {{attLost}}.
battleReport.summaryConquestDefended: Enemy conquest failed. Your defenses held. Enemy lost {{attLost}} soldiers. You lost {{defLost}}.
battleReport.summaryConquestFail: Conquest failed. Enemy defense held. You lost {{attLost}} soldiers.
battleReport.summaryConquestRepelled: Conquest repelled. Your defenses held firm. You lost {{defLost}} soldiers.
battleReport.summaryDestructionWin: Strike succeeded. Enemy security dropped {{sec}}%. You lost {{attLost}} soldiers.
battleReport.summaryDestructionLost: Strike on your nation succeeded. Your security dropped by {{sec}}%. You lost {{defLost}} soldiers.
battleReport.summaryDestructionFail: Strike failed. Enemy defenses held. You lost {{attLost}} soldiers.
battleReport.summaryDestructionRepelled: Strike repelled. Your security index held.
battleReport.summaryAirWin: Air superiority achieved. Enemy air force suppressed.
battleReport.summaryAirFail: Air strike failed. Enemy air defenses held.
battleReport.summarySEADFail: SEAD mission failed. Enemy SAMs remained active.
battleReport.summaryBlockadeWin: Naval blockade established. Enemy trade routes cut.
battleReport.summaryBlockadeFail: Blockade attempt failed. Enemy fleet repelled your ships.
battleReport.summaryFullAssaultWin: Full assault succeeded. Seized {{land}} land{{facility}}. Eliminated {{soldiers}} soldiers{{equipment}}{{security}}.
